basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest ICAR Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Senior Research Fellow (SRF) posts! Published at the official website, this new recruitment drive offers 2 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the maximum 35 years age limit and possessing a Master’s degree in Genetics/Plant Breeding/Plant Breeding and Genetics/Biotechnology/Life Sciences or related subjects can apply through email on or before 20-06-2026. Find all details about the ICAR IARI Senior Research Fellow (SRF) new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, application

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: five years for SC/ST & women and three years for OBC.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Genetics/Plant Breeding/Plant Breeding and Genetics/Biotechnology/Life Sciences or related subjects
qualification.details: Master's degree in Genetics/Plant Breeding/Plant Breeding and Genetics/Biotechnology/Life Sciences or related subjects from a recognized University with 4 years/5 years of Bachelor’s degree. OR Candidate having a postgraduate degree in Basic Science with a 3 years Bachelor’s degree and a 2 years Master’s degree should have qualified NET and 02 years of research experience.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Senior Research Fellow (SRF) in CRP on Molecular Breeding (Tomato)
Senior Research Fellow (SRF) in CRP on Hybrid Technology (Tomato)

selection_process: Application Screening Online Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR IARI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
